content:
Commit pushed successfully. **Commit:** `eaabda02` — `fix(homepage): replace conditional welcome text with static message` **What changed:** `src/app/(frontend)/page.tsx` — replaced the two-line conditional (`{!user &&

Welcome to your new project.

}` / `{user &&

Welcome back, {user.email}

}`) with a single static `

Welcome from kody — verify run 1778739418051

`.
